tier.description: WHO IMCI traffic-light tier. Pink = severe/refer urgently. Yellow = moderate/treat at facility. Green = mild/home care.

pathway.description: Concrete next steps the CHW should take. Must be IMCI-protocol-grounded. Pink-tier pathways MUST contain 'Refer urgently' or equivalent.

reasoning.description: Which IMCI classification rule was applied. Cite the section (e.g. 'Section 3, Some dehydration').

confidence.description: Model self-reported confidence. If < 0.4 the safety layer appends 'Escalate to medical officer' to pathway.
